prevalence.source: IHME GBD (bipolar disorder) + subtype distribution syntheses

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: DSM-5/ICD-11: at least one manic episode; may include major depressive episodes

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Variable; depends on maintenance adherence and psychosocial supports

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Often diagnosed in specialist settings after severe episodes
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Mood stabilizers and antipsychotics; relapse prevention and psychoeducation; crisis care via CAPS/hospital services
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Adherence and continuity of care, especially outside urban centers
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Availability of core mood stabilizers and public mental health service network
